name: assemble-team
description: 5-layer harness (Entry → Routing → Enrichment → Verification → Handoff) that converts a user plan into a safely spawned Claude Code agent team. Universal — works with any monorepo. Ports a planning-discipline pattern observed in oh-my-openagent (Prometheus) and oh-my-claudecode (plan/deep-interview/ralplan) into a reusable plugin.
